name: Friendmocracy
short_description: Friendmocracy is the party game where voting wins points! Players vote based on fun, wild, or even spicy (Adult Mode) prompts—match the majority to score. Add your own prompts for endless fun! Perfect for friends, debates, and surprises. Will you vote wisely?
detailed_description:
Friendmocracy is the ultimate party game where voting is the key to victory! Players receive a prompt and cast their votes for others in the game. But the real challenge? Guessing what the majority will choose! The more in sync you are with the group, the more points you rack up.

With prompts ranging from lighthearted to absolutely wild, every round keeps you on your toes. Feeling daring? Turn on Adult Mode for spicier, more unpredictable questions. Want to add your own twist? Customize the experience with your own prompts!

Whether you're playing with close friends or breaking the ice with new ones, Friendmocracy guarantees laughter, debate, and plenty of surprises. Will you follow the crowd or risk it all on an outlier vote?
